title.en: England's match with Mexico delayed by an hour
title.zh-CN: 英格兰与墨西哥的比赛推迟了一个小时

summary.en: England's World Cup last-16 match with Mexico in Mexico City is delayed by one hour because of severe weather and is set to kick off at 02:00 BST.
summary.zh-CN: 由于恶劣天气，英格兰队与墨西哥队在墨西哥城举行的最后16场世界杯比赛推迟了一个小时，并将于英国夏令时02:00开始。

title.en: Red card system in disarray over Trump, Fifa and Balogun decision
title.zh-CN: 红牌系统因特朗普、国际足联和巴洛根的决定而陷入混乱

summary.en: The decision to effectively overturn the red card shown to United States forward Florian Balogun's leaves many unanswered questions.
summary.zh-CN: 有效推翻向美国前锋弗洛里安·巴洛贡（ Florian Balogun ）展示的红牌的决定留下了许多悬而未决的问题。

title.en: BBC offers 'Stay Up or Catch Up' for England v Mexico
title.zh-CN: 英国广播公司为英格兰v墨西哥提供“Stay Up or Catch Up”

summary.en: The BBC will be launching a special 'Stay Up or Catch Up' offer for its live coverage of England's game against Mexico at the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司将推出一项特别的“Stay Up or Catch Up”优惠，以现场报道英格兰队在2026年世界杯对阵墨西哥队的比赛。

title.en: Mexico fans fail in bid to wake up England players
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥球迷未能唤醒英格兰球员

summary.en: England players feel little to no impact of Mexico fans attempting to disturb their sleep by letting off fireworks outside their hotel.
summary.zh-CN: 墨西哥球迷试图通过在酒店外放烟花来扰乱他们的睡眠，英格兰球员几乎没有受到影响。

title.en: The Norway story - 28-year wait for their biggest-ever party
title.zh-CN: 挪威的故事-等待他们有史以来规模最大的派对28年

summary.en: Norway have waited 28 years for an appearance at the World Cup - now they face Brazil hoping to make history by reaching the quarter-finals for the first time.
summary.zh-CN: 挪威已经等待了28年才能参加世界杯-现在他们面对巴西，希望通过首次进入四分之一决赛来创造历史。

title.en: England have struggled against low block - could they use it to beat Mexico?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰一直在与低区块作斗争-他们能用它来击败墨西哥吗？

summary.en: England face Mexico in the last 16 of the World Cup in Mexico City - Thomas Tuchel could change tactics to combat the hosts and the altitude to book a place in the quarter-finals.
summary.zh-CN: 在墨西哥城举行的世界杯最后16场比赛中，英格兰对阵墨西哥--托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）可能会改变战术，与东道主和海拔高度作斗争，在四分之一决赛中预订一席之地

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 28
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星28号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: Thousands welcome home Cape Verde players after stunning World Cup run
title.zh-CN: 成千上万的佛得角球员在令人惊叹的世界杯比赛后欢迎回家

summary.en: Tens of thousands of fans formed an ocean of blue outside the airport in capital city, Praia.
summary.zh-CN: 成千上万的粉丝在首都普拉亚机场外形成了一片蓝色的海洋。

title.en: England into last 16 - what is their path to the final?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队进入16强-他们进入决赛的道路是什么？

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after progressing the last 16
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台（ BBC Sport ）了解英格兰队在晋级16强后需要做些什么才能进入决赛

title.en: Mexico vs England LIVE! Kick-off delayed due to thunderstorm
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥vs英格兰现场直播！由于雷雨，启动延迟

title.en: ⁠'That was the thunder we were talking about' | Lightning strikes ahead of Mexico vs England
title.zh-CN: “这就是我们谈论的雷声” |墨西哥对英格兰之前的闪电袭击

summary.en: Sky Sports' chief correspondent Kaveh Solhekol and football correspondent Rob Dorsett report on England's chances against Mexico in their World Cup clash as lightning strikes.
summary.zh-CN: 天空体育的首席记者Kaveh Solhekol和足球记者Rob Dorsett报道了英格兰在世界杯比赛中击败墨西哥的机会。

title.en: Key moments and rate the players as Norway knock out Brazil
title.zh-CN: 关键时刻，在挪威击败巴西时给球员打分

title.en: Balogun ban overturned amid reports White House contacted FIFA
title.zh-CN: 在白宫联系国际足联的报道中， Balogun禁令被推翻

summary.en: FIFA has stepped in to make banned USA striker Folarin Balogun available for the World Cup last-16 tie with Belgium.
summary.zh-CN: 国际足联已经介入，让被禁的美国前锋Folarin Balogun可以参加世界杯的最后16场比赛，与比利时并列。

title.en: World Cup latest: 'I'll finish when I want to' - Ronaldo hits back at retirement talk
title.zh-CN: 世界杯最新消息： “我想什么时候结束就什么时候结束” --罗纳尔多在退役演讲中回击

summary.en: BBC pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger, Joe Hart and Micah Richards discuss Paraguay's attempts to get under France's skin at the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Mbappe coolly fires France into lead from penalty spot

summary.en: France's Kylian Mbappe keeps his cool to send Paraguay goalkeeper Orlando Gill the wrong way to score his seventh goal of the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Why England won't fear Mexico or the Azteca - Shearer

summary.en: Former England captain Alan Shearer explains why Thomas Tuchel's team will not be worried about the difficult conditions when they play Mexico at the Azteca Stadium.

title.en: Unbeaten in 34 matches - why Morocco are World Cup contenders

summary.en: As  Morocco beat Canada to book their place in the last-8, their World Cup campaign can no longer be seen as a fairytale.

title.en: Five and a half hours that left England's World Cup tie in chaos

summary.en: For several hours on Friday, no-one seemed to know when England's World Cup last-16 match against co-hosts Mexico would kick off. BBC Sport explains how a story of confusion and anger - culminating...

title.en: Brazil going out? Chris Sutton predicts World Cup's last-16 matches

summary.en: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the last-16 ties at the 2026 World Cup, including England against Mexico.

title.en: In spotlight but shunning limelight - Olise's unique rise to top

summary.en: A footballer who dislikes too much media attention, but Michael Olise might not have much choice if he carries on his World Cup heroics.

title.en: Morocco reach quarter-finals as co-hosts Canada knocked out

summary.en: Canada become the first of co-hosts to exit the 2026 World Cup, after being beaten 3-0 by Morocco in Houston.

title.en: Ounahi gives Morocco the lead against Canada

summary.en: Azzedine Ounahi scores the opener for Morocco against Canada in the last 32 of the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Argentina overcome Cape Verde in extra-time thriller

summary.en: Argentina overcome a huge scare as they beat Cape Verde 3-2 in extra time thanks to a deflected header from Cristian Romero to advance to the last 16.

title.en: 'Sensational' Messi finish gives Argentina the lead

summary.en: Lionel Messi hits Argentina's opening goal against Cape Verde with a "sensational" finish in Miami, as he scores in an eighth consecutive World Cup game.

title.en: 'What a strike!' - Cabral hits brilliant goal to draw Cape Verde level in extra time

summary.en: Sidny Cabral scores an incredible goal in extra time for Cape Verde as they equalise for a second time against Argentina.

title.en: Arias strike sends Colombia into last 16 with victory over Ghana

summary.en: Jhon Arias scores the only goal of the game as Colombia become the last team to book their place in the last 16 following a 1-0 win over Ghana in Kansas City.

title.en: Argentina stunned as Duarte equalises for Cape Verde

summary.en: Deroy Duarte stuns Argentina as he equalises for Cape Verde during their World Cup round of 32 match in Miami.
